concerns.text: FR-008 requires a sensitivity analysis comparing models trained on raw vs. imputed grain size. The plan.md mentions KNN imputation (Complexity Tracking) and data flow, but contains no explicit phase, task, or contract element dedicated to performing this specific sensitivity analysis or measuring the bias introduced by imputation (SC-005).

SC-004 requires measuring model robustness via stability of metrics across different random seeds. The plan.md mentions 'Random seeds (42) enforced' in the Constitution Check, but does not include a specific task, phase, or evaluation step to run multiple seeds and measure/report the variance/stability of the results.
